characters.name: Margaret Monreaux
characters.description: Margaret MonreauxBiographical InformationGenderFemaleStatusAliveRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed(mother)Eugene Monreaux(husband)Eric Monreaux(son)Rose Monreaux(daughter)Becky Monreaux(daughter-in-law)Ginger Sweet(step-daughter)Antonio Rivera(step-son)Jason Conley(step-son)FriendsFranklin LeeEnemiesPaul Luke ThomasGinger SweetPortrayalPortrayerKim CattrallLo Graham(youth)First AppearanceLast AppearancePilot1 Corinthians 3:13Margaret Monreauxis one of the main characters inFilthy Rich. She is portrayed byKim Cattrall, as well as byLo Grahamin the character's youth. She is the star of a hugely popular lifestyle TV show and the creator of a conservative TV network that she runs with her husband. She was a servant at a party with her best and long time friend, Frankiln Lee forEugene Monreaux, her later husband. After she and Eugene got married, they had two kids, Eric and Rose.
